active.name: PM-KISAN
active.summary: Rs 6,000/year in 3 installments to all landholding farmers. Apply via pmkisan.gov.in or CSC center.
active.eligibility: All farmer families with cultivable land

active.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
active.summary: Crop insurance at 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi. Covers natural calamities, pests, diseases.
active.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas

active.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
active.summary: Credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest for crop cultivation, post-harvest, and allied activities.

active.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
active.summary: Free soil testing and nutrient-based fertilizer recommendations every 2 years.
active.eligibility: All farmers — visit nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra

active.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi — Drone Didi
active.summary: Free drone-based pesticide spraying service through women SHGs in select districts.
active.eligibility: Farmers in pilot districts — check with local agriculture office
